findings.answer_body: Based on these records, the archive view is a comprehensive collection of visual and design records organized by geography and typography, managed by Wikimedia Commons and the Paganini archive. Specific rights states and image-state codes define its scope.
Based on these records, SURF-CGS2026R0909 is a 1846 publication from Brazil, while SURF-CRG2026R0100 is a 1885 publication from Vietnam.
Based on these records, SURF-CRG2026R0027 is a Japanese military aerial reconnaissance image while SURF-ER1830R059 is a 19th-century French sculptress portrait.
Based on these records, the 1865 Zanzibar stamp is a South Asian currency, while the 1895 US Modern Poster is a US currency.
Based on these records, SURF-CRG2026R0153 is a 1895 South Asia Indian street musician, while SURF-CGS2026R0908 is a 1842 Latin American Mexico museum.

findings.answer_body: Based on these records, SURF-ER1830R002 (1840-1849) and SURF-CGS2026R0910 (1846) differ in region and date. an early is from the Caribbean, while the second is from Latin America/Mexico.
